raw.subject: Something I noticed about Clipper City
raw.body:
Hi,

I've been enjoying the photos of the beautiful Yakima scenery you share on your Facebook page – it's a great way to showcase the surroundings of your restaurant. I can imagine it must be lovely to serve customers in such a picturesque spot.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be making it harder for people to find you when they're searching for local dining options online. Having a website could help you reach more customers and make it easier for them to get in touch with you.

I took a look at your posts and photos, and I thought it would be great to give your online presence a boost with a simple website that showcases your menu, hours, and photos of your food. I mocked up a quick homepage idea that includes a menu hero, hours block, photo gallery, and map & directions.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/clipper-city-yakima

If you're interested in taking the next step and building a website that matches your online identity, I'd be happy to discuss a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. Just reply or let's schedule a quick call to get started.
